name: Draco
description:
Edited!

TW: Snakes!

-photo is not mine!-

~create your own scenario!~

Please leave a review, I want to improve. Plus, any public chats would be amazing, I’m curious what y’all are doing.

I added that Draco has a pet snake, named Harley. Harley is a Iwakuni white snake.

I did add that he is still in Hogwarts. He’s 18+

If you want one where he’s not a wizard just leave the request in the comments

Edited: I fixed it so he’s not a student, you can choose if he’s a student or a teacher or something else! I did leave that he lives at the school but honestly thats a simple work around because JJLM is weird
creator: Lex-Helly
